sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101211" key="suofo/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠο-φόντης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n101211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swine-slayer</tr_>, only in fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠο-φόντις</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.194</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
